name: Chocolate Chip Sponge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites and 2 tablespoons (from the 1 1/2 cups) sugar until stiff peaks form.
2. Beat egg yolks until lemony yellow, gradually adding the remaining sugar.
3. Sift together cake flour and potato starch.
4. Fold the egg whites into the batter, alternating with the egg yolk mixture.
5. Gently fold in the grated chocolate chips.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 50-55 minutes in a tube pan or bundt pan.
7. Invert the pan and cool before removing from the pan.
